name: SCC_GetSalesTariffEntryData
title: SCC_GetSalesTariffEntryData
syntax: void SCC_GetSalesTariffEntryData ( long i1, long i2, long& Start, long& Duration, long& EPriceLevel, long& ConsumptionCostCount )
description: Gets the start time, duration, price level and the number of ConsumptionCost subelements of the SalesTariffEntry with the selected indices.
return:
The start time, duration, price level and the number of ConsumptionCost subelements of the SalesTariffEntry with the selected indices via references, where
If the optional element EPriceLevel is not present, a value of -1 is returned.
